title: This Underappreciated Growth Stock Could Have Huge Upside in 2023
text: This health insurer appears poised to outperform the S&P 500 index for the third consecutive year in 2023.

title: Health Net Federal Services Welcomes New Interns from the Department of Defense SkillBridge Program
text: Three Military Transition Interns Start January 2023. ARLINGTON, Va.

title: CENTENE COMPLETES DIVESTITURE OF MAGELLAN SPECIALTY HEALTH
text: ST. LOUIS , Jan. 23, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Centene Corporation (NYSE: CNC) announced today that it has completed the previously announced divestiture of Magellan Specialty Health to Evolent Health, Inc. (Evolent). "We are pleased to reach another significant milestone in our ongoing portfolio review and value creation plan," said Sarah London, Chief Executive Officer of Centene.

title: CENTENE CORPORATION SCHEDULES 2022 FOURTH QUARTER AND FULL YEAR FINANCIAL RESULTS CONFERENCE CALL
text: ST. LOUIS , Jan. 13, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Centene Corporation (NYSE: CNC) today issued a reminder that it will release its 2022 fourth quarter and full year financial results at approximately 6 a.m. (Eastern Time) on Tuesday, February 7, 2023, and will host a conference call afterwards at approximately 8:30 a.m.

title: Centene (CNC) Wins Contract From DHCS to Serve Medi-Cal Members
text: Centene's (CNC) California subsidiary receives a contract from the DHCS to better address the health requirements of the state's Medi-Cal members.

title: Why Hold Strategy is Apt for Centene (CNC) Stock Right Now
text: Centene's (CNC) health benefits ratio is expected to improve in the coming days, signaling better operating efficiency.

title: Centene boosts 2024 profit outlook after new Medi-Cal contracts from DHCS
text: Centene Corp. CNC, +0.35% raised on Tuesday the low end of its 2024 profit outlook, after the healthcare services provider announced new Medi-Cal direct contracts. The company said it raised its projected floor for 2024 adjusted earnings per share to $7.15; at Centene's investor day on Dec. 16, the company said it targeted 2024 adjusted EPS of $7.00 to $7.50+.

title: CENTENE'S HEALTH NET ISSUED NEW MEDI-CAL DIRECT CONTRACTS BY CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH CARE SERVICES
text: Health Net to Serve Members in 10 counties including Los Angeles and Sacramento Counties ST. LOUIS , Jan. 3, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Centene Corporation (NYSE: CNC) announced today the California Department of Health Care Services (DHCS) has selected its California subsidiary Health Net of California (Health Net) for direct contracts in Los Angeles and Sacramento counties, increasing the number of direct county contracts by DHCS to 10.

title: Community Health System and Health Net Agree on Multi-year Network Contract
text: Eligible Fresno Residents enrolled across Health Net's lines of business will have full access to Community's three major hospitals in Fresno County. SACRAMENTO, Calif.
